fields.name: Field No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the field in Business Central.

fields.name: Integration Table Field No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the field number of the integration field to map to the Business Central field.

fields.name: Direction
fields.tooltip: Specifies the direction of the synchronization.

fields.name: Constant Value
fields.tooltip: Specifies the constant value that the mapped field will be set to.

fields.name: Validate Field
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the field should be validated during assignment in Business Central.

fields.name: Validate Integration Table Fld
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the integration field should be validated during assignment in Dynamics 365 Sales.

fields.name: Clear Value on Failed Sync
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the field value should be cleared in case of integration error during assignment in Dynamics 365 Sales.

fields.name: Status
fields.tooltip: Specifies if field synchronization is enabled or disabled.

fields.name: Not Null
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the data transfer should be skipped for destination fields whose new value is going to be null. This is only applicable for GUID fields, such as OwnerId, that must not be changed to null during synchronization.

fields.name: Transformation Rule
fields.tooltip: Specifies a rule for transforming imported text to a supported value before it can be mapped to a specified field in Microsoft Dynamics 365.

fields.name: Transformation Direction
fields.tooltip: Specifies the direction of the transformation.

fields.name: Use For Match-Based Coupling
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether to match on this field when looking for the entity to couple to.

fields.name: Case-Sensitive Matching
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the matching on this field should be case-sensitive.

fields.name: Match Priority
fields.tooltip: Specifies in which priority order will the groups of matching fields be used to find a match.

fields.name: User Defined
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the field is generated manually through the integration table mapping wizard.
